Supply Chain Networks
What to do What’s trending Partners Leaders Careers
What to do What’s trending Partners Leaders Careers

Supply chain consulting

Reimagine, build and operate your supply chain network to orchestrate change, simplify life and positively impact business, society and the planet.

Supply chain networks now

$1.6T

is the average revenue growth opportunity that businesses are missing each year due to vulnerability to disruption

64%

of emissions come from Tier 2 suppliers and beyond

43%

of total working hours in supply chain roles can be transformed by generative AI

31%

of companies take over 120 days to recover from disruption

How to reinvent supply chain networks

Close
SUPPLY CHAIN STRATEGY

Shift linear supply chains to a resilient, autonomous, circular networks

With $1.6T missed annual revenue growth due to disruptions, prioritizing your supply chain is a must. Learn how to identify the capabilities to help you adapt to current and future business needs.
Learn more
SUPPLY CHAIN STRATEGY

Shift linear supply chains to a resilient, autonomous, circular networks

With $1.6T missed annual revenue growth due to disruptions, prioritizing your supply chain is a must. Learn how to identify the capabilities to help you adapt to current and future business needs.
Learn more
Close
AUTONOMOUS SUPPLY CHAIN NETWORKS

Power functional solutions with technology, skills and new ways of working

57% of companies take more than a week to be alerted to supply network disruption. Autonomous supply chain networks enable business agility, improved responsiveness and cost efficiencies.
Learn more
AUTONOMOUS SUPPLY CHAIN NETWORKS

Power functional solutions with technology, skills and new ways of working

57% of companies take more than a week to be alerted to supply network disruption. Autonomous supply chain networks enable business agility, improved responsiveness and cost efficiencies.
Learn more
Close
SUSTAINABLE VALUE CHAIN

Embed sustainability by design into your supply chain operations

60% of global emissions come from supply chains. Embed sustainability into each supply chain function to enable value chain decarbonization, resource circularity, and traceability.
Learn more
SUSTAINABLE VALUE CHAIN

Embed sustainability by design into your supply chain operations

60% of global emissions come from supply chains. Embed sustainability into each supply chain function to enable value chain decarbonization, resource circularity, and traceability.
Learn more
Close
STRATEGIC MANAGED SERVICES

Elevate your supply chain to refocus your talent on strategic goals

52% of CEOs are prioritizing supply chain optimization. Unlock your team’s potential with intelligent operations and shift focus to more strategic tasks. Start innovating and improving at pace.
Learn more
STRATEGIC MANAGED SERVICES

Elevate your supply chain to refocus your talent on strategic goals

52% of CEOs are prioritizing supply chain optimization. Unlock your team’s potential with intelligent operations and shift focus to more strategic tasks. Start innovating and improving at pace.
Learn more

Areas we support

  • Cross-supply chain network
    Cross-supply chain network

    Enable greater resiliency, sustainability and efficiency with end-to-end capabilities, eco-design simulations and a connected organization.

  • Engineering
    Engineering

    Design and engineer new products and services that your customers will love—faster, more sustainably, and at a lower cost.

    Learn more
  • Planning
    Planning

    Improve planning by leveraging visibility, AI and decision intelligence to optimize your inventory strategy and network to meet service requirements.

  • Sourcing & procurement
    Sourcing & procurement

    Find new competitive advantages in sourcing and procurement using AI and automation.

    Learn more
  • Manufacturing
    Manufacturing

    Use data and AI to connect demand and production, embedding resilience, productivity and sustainability in the way you make your products.

    Learn more
  • Fulfillment
    Fulfillment

    Leverage intelligent technologies to increase warehouse and logistics performance, reduce costs and embed responsible business practices.

    Learn more
  • After-sales service
    After-sales service

    Enable as-as-service business models and aftermarket service and repair with advanced supply chain capabilities.

    Learn more

What’s trending in supply chain networks

View all work
Perspective
Making self-funding supply chains real

Discover how AI and autonomous technologies create self‑funding supply chains, cutting costs, boosting productivity and enabling end‑to‑end growth.

Expand
Research Report
Are you ready for autonomous supply chains?

Companies are seeing diminishing returns from classic business efficiency strategies. To create value, supply chains need to be fast, agile and sustainable, not just cost-efficient. Could AI-powered autonomy be the key to unlocking this?

Expand
Case Study
Transforming tradition for a multinational food corporation

A global food giant partnered with Accenture to revolutionize their supply chain and operations using AI, data and automation, resulting in significant efficiency gains.

Expand
Perspective
Navigating the new tariff landscape and its economic impact

U.S. tariffs have introduced unprecedented uncertainty for executives to adapt to. In this perspective, we outline four pillars of resilience that enable enterprise resilience and how they can help you navigate the new tariff landscape.

Expand
Research Report
Resilience redefined: From readiness to reinvention

Resilience appears to be rebounding to post-pandemic highs, but the gains mask a deeper vulnerability. Increased volatility requires adaptative resilience for competitiveness and growth.

Expand
Blog
Next-gen supply chain: The journey from automation to full autonomy

Generative AI is transforming supply chains from automation to autonomy, providing unparalleled efficiency and innovation. By leveraging advanced AI and seamless data integration, supply chains can achieve optimal performance.

Expand
Research Report
Tap into new value with advanced supply chain capabilities

Companies using more mature capabilities across their supply chain networks are unlocking considerable business value. Here’s what next-gen supply chains look like and how key enablers help build greater maturity. 

Expand
Research Report
Resilience in flight: securing future growth amid volatility

The latest Accenture Commercial Aerospace Insight Report indicates that global revenues are on track for a 12% revenue increase in 2025.

Expand

Partners in change

Helping unlock the value of your SAP application portfolio with the power of intelligence, innovation and industry.

Build solutions that transform industries, communities and lives for the better using AWS world-leading cloud technologies. Together, we empower organizations to modernize, optimize and innovate at scale.

Learn more

Achieve transformative results through scalable infrastructure, advanced data analytics, robust security, targeted advertising and cutting-edge generative AI. Foster a culture of continuous innovation.

Learn more

Reinvent how you work with Microsoft’s secure, agile and AI-powered platforms and tools, designed to meet the evolving needs of your organization.

Learn more

Implement end-to-end solutions including infrastructure, applications, middleware, and databases that are flexible, scalable, enhance efficiency, and enable businesses to achieve their goals.

Learn more

Extended partner ecosystem

Connected solutions

Awards and recognition

Accenture is a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Custom Software Development Services

For the 4th consecutive year, Accenture is positioned as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Custom Software Development Services (CSDS) report, which evaluated 20 full-spectrum and pure-play service providers.

Learn more

Accenture is named a Leader in Everest Group’s Procurement Outsourcing (PO) Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025

Everest Group has positioned Accenture as the highest-designated Leader on both the Market Impact axis and the Vision and Capability axis. Accenture is also a Star Performer in this report, reflecting our significant growth in this area.

Learn more

Accenture is named a Leader in Everest Group’s Supply Chain Management BPS PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025

Everest Group has positioned Accenture as the highest-designated Leader on both the Vision and Capability axis and the Market Impact axis. Accenture is also named a Star Performer in this report, recognizing our strong performance.

Learn more

A Leader in Intelligent Supply Chain Services for Life Sciences

Accenture has been named a leader in the IDC MarketScape report for Worldwide Life Sciences Intelligent Supply Chain Services 2025.

Learn more

Success is rooted in smart strategy. Use your insights and strategic thinking to understand how our clients can reinvent to stay ahead of change.
